top_source_opportunity.recommended_offer: Launch a personalized engraved gift bundle with scripture, family names, or business branding.
risks: Main risk is execution speed: validate demand before building a large catalog.
next_actions: Pick the strongest niche angle and draft 3 listing titles.
Estimate blank/product cost, labor time, shipping, and Etsy fees before publishing.
Create one mockup or sample photo, then test with local/social audience before scaling.

sample_listings.title: Custom Laser Engraved Cutting Board Gift

design_concepts.design_title: Custom Laser Engraved Gifts: Heirloom Scripture Minimal
design_concepts.design_concept: A premium personalized keepsake built around family names, short scripture text, and a clean monogram focal point. Hunter offer context: Launch a personalized engraved gift bundle with scripture, family names, or business branding.
design_concepts.art_direction: Minimal heirloom composition with centered engraving layout, fine line botanical accents, generous negative space, and balanced product mockup framing.
design_concepts.typography_suggestions: Elegant serif for the family name, small caps sans-serif for dates, and restrained script only for one accent word.
design_concepts.openai_image_prompt: OpenAI image generation prompt: Create an original Etsy-ready product design for custom laser engraved gifts. premium heirloom engraving layout, clean monogram centerpiece, fine botanical line art, warm natural material texture. Use this market context without copying listings: Custom Laser Engraved Cutting Board Gift; Personalized Engraved Tumbler; Engraved Scripture Wood Sign. Flat vector or clean product-design artwork, crisp edges, high readability, balanced composition, transparent background, print-on-demand ready, no mockup text cut off, no copyrighted characters, no brand logos, no trademarked slogans, no photorealistic people. Color palette: warm walnut brown, soft ivory, charcoal ink, muted sage, brushed gold accent.
design_concepts.image_prompt: OpenAI image generation prompt: Create an original Etsy-ready product design for custom laser engraved gifts. premium heirloom engraving layout, clean monogram centerpiece, fine botanical line art, warm natural material texture. design_concepts.commercial_use_notes: Original artwork direction for the 'custom laser engraved gifts' opportunity. No copyrighted characters, sports/team marks, brand logos, celebrity names, protected lyrics, or trademarked slogans. Verify phrase trademark status before listing, use licensed fonts/graphics only, and create final production art from owned or properly licensed assets. Public listing, ad spend, or customer outreach requires Manny approval.

design_concepts.design_title: Faith Family Shirts: Faith Family Matching Set
design_concepts.design_concept: A coordinated family or church-group apparel design that feels warm, modern, and photo-ready for Etsy listing mockups. Hunter offer context: Launch a faith-forward personalized apparel offer with matching family/church group options.
design_concepts.art_direction: Stacked badge layout with subtle rays, hand-lettered faith phrase, and adaptable placement for adult, youth, and toddler shirts.
design_concepts.typography_suggestions: Friendly bold serif headline paired with rounded sans-serif supporting text; preserve readability at shirt-print distance.

design_concepts.design_title: Custom Embroidered Hats: Kingdom Workwear Patch
design_concepts.design_concept: A durable embroidered hat or workwear patch design for teams, volunteers, and entrepreneurs who want a faith-rooted identity piece. Hunter offer context: Launch a 12-piece custom embroidered hat starter bundle for churches, teams, and local businesses.
design_concepts.art_direction: Simple patch-ready shield or rectangle mark with bold icon, limited thread colors, and clear silhouette for embroidery digitizing.
design_concepts.typography_suggestions: Block sans-serif or slab serif, no hairline strokes, all text large enough to survive embroidery on a hat front.
design_concepts.openai_image_prompt: OpenAI image generation prompt: Create an original Etsy-ready product design for custom embroidered hats. embroidered workwear hat patch, simple shield badge, faith rooted identity, limited thread color vector art. Use this market context without copying listings: Custom Embroidered Richardson 112 Trucker Hat; Personalized Dad Hat with Logo Embroidery; Bulk Custom Church Group Embroidered Hats. Flat vector or clean product-design artwork, crisp edges, high readability, balanced composition, transparent background, print-on-demand ready, no mockup text cut off, no copyrighted characters, no brand logos, no trademarked slogans, no photorealistic people. Color palette: khaki, deep navy, white, rust, forest green.
